subject: NuEm-210111A: MAXI/GSC upper limit
body:
M. Serino (AGU), T. Mihara (RIKEN),
H. Negoro, M. Nakajima, M. Aoki, K. Kobayashi, R. Takagi, K. Asakura, K. Seino (Nihon U.),
T. Tamagawa, M. Matsuoka (RIKEN),
T. Sakamoto, S. Sugita, H. Nishida, K. Komachi, A. Yoshida (AGU),
Y. Tsuboi, W. Iwakiri, R. Sasaki, H. Kawai, Y. Okamoto, S. Kitakoga (Chuo U.),
M. Shidatsu (Ehime U.),
N. Kawai, R. Adachi, M. Niwano (Tokyo Tech),
S. Nakahira, Y. Sugawara, S. Ueno, H. Tomida, M. Ishikawa, M. Tominaga, T. Nagatsuka (JAXA),
Y. Ueda, S. Yamada, S. Ogawa, K. Setoguchi, T. Yoshitake, Y. Goto, R. Uematsu (Kyoto U.),
H. Tsunemi (Osaka U.),
M. Yamauchi, K. Kurogi, K. Miike (Miyazaki U.),
T. Kawamuro (NAOJ),
K. Yamaoka (Nagoya U.),
Y. Kawakubo (LSU),
M. Sugizaki (NAOC) 
report on behalf of the MAXI team:

We report the non-detection of MAXI/GSC of the AMON 
NuEm-210111A (GCN #29287).
During the transit time of HAWC, MAXI/GSC scanned the position 
of the event four times (07:37, 09:10, 10:43, and 12:16) . 
No significant excess emission was detected from the region. 
Typical 1-sigma upper limits in 2-20 keV for one scan and four scans are
20 mCrab and 10 mCrab, for each.
